git status

git remote -v

git remote add origin https://github.com/sg-evals/terraform--v1.10.3.git && git fetch origin --all 2>&1 | head -20
git config --list | grep remote
git fetch origin 2>&1 | head -20

cat > /tmp/refactor.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Refactor NodeAbstractResourceInstance to NodeResourceInstanceBase

FILES=(
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance_test.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_diff.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_state.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_data_destroy.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_plan.go"
    "internal/terraform/graph_builder_plan.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_deferred.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_apply.go"
    "internal/terraform/graph_builder_apply.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_import.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_forget.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_destroy.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_orphan_count.go"
)

for file in "${FILES[@]}"; do
    echo "Processing $file..."
    # Create backup
    cp "$file" "$file.bak"
    # Apply refactoring
    sed -i 's/NodeAbstractResourceInstance/NodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
    sed -i 's/NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance/NewNodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
done

echo "Refactoring complete!"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/refactor.sh
bash /tmp/refactor.sh

echo "=== Verifying main definition file ===" && grep -n "type NodeResourceInstanceBase" internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go | head -1 && echo "=== Verifying constructor ===" && grep -n "func NewNodeResourceInstanceBase" internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go | head -1 && echo "=== Verifying no old names remain ===" && grep -c "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go || echo "No old names found (good!)"

echo "=== Checking node_resource_destroy.go ===" && grep "NodeResourceInstanceBase" internal/terraform/node_resource_destroy.go | head -3 && echo && echo "=== Checking transform_diff.go ===" && grep "NewNodeResourceInstanceBase" internal/terraform/transform_diff.go | head -2 && echo && echo "=== Checking graph_builder_plan.go ===" && grep "\*NodeResourceInstanceBase" internal/terraform/graph_builder_plan.go | head -2
go test ./internal/terraform -run Test.*NodeResourceInstanceBase -v 2>&1 | head -100
ls -la | grep -i make

echo "=== Checking for any remaining old type name ===" && grep -r "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/ --include="*.go" 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo && echo "=== Should be 0, if not higher, let's check what's left ===" && grep -r "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/ --include="*.go" 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "None found - Perfect!"

grep -l "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/*.go | while read file; do
    if ! grep -q "NodeResourceInstanceBase" "$file"; then
        echo "Processing additional file: $file"
        sed -i 's/NodeAbstractResourceInstance/NodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
        sed -i 's/NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance/NewNodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
    fi
done && echo "All files updated!"
find internal/terraform -name "*.go" -type f -exec grep -l "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" {} \;

files="internal/terraform/node_data_destroy_test.go
internal/terraform/node_resource_apply_deferred.go
internal/terraform/node_resource_apply_instance.go
internal/terraform/node_resource_destroy_deposed.go

internal/terraform/transform_orphan_resource.go
internal/terraform/transform_orphan_resource_test.go
internal/terraform/transform_resource_count.go"

for file in $files; do
    echo "Processing: $file"
    sed -i 's/NodeAbstractResourceInstance/NodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
    sed -i 's/NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance/NewNodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
done

echo "All files updated!"

echo "=== Checking for any remaining old type name ===" && grep -r "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/ --include="*.go" 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo && if [ $(grep -r "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/ --include="*.go" 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -eq 0 ]; then echo "✓ All instances refactored successfully!"; else echo "Remaining instances:"; grep -r "NodeAbstractResourceInstance" internal/terraform/ --include="*.go" 2>/dev/null | head -10; fi

code_changes.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Script to refactor NodeAbstractResourceInstance to NodeResourceInstanceBase"""

import subprocess
import json
import os

# Files that need to be updated
FILES_TO_UPDATE = [
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance_test.go",
    "internal/terraform/transform_diff.go",
    "internal/terraform/transform_state.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_data_destroy.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_plan.go",
    "internal/terraform/graph_builder_plan.go",
    "internal/terraform/transform_deferred.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_apply.go",
    "internal/terraform/graph_builder_apply.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_import.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_forget.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_destroy.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract.go",
    "internal/terraform/transform_orphan_count.go",
]

def get_file_content_from_sg(file_path):
    """Fetch file content from Sourcegraph via sg tool"""
    # Since we can't directly call sg_read_file from Python, we'll use a different approach
    # We'll create a helper to fetch via curl from the GitHub raw content
    pass

def apply_refactoring(content):
    """Apply the refactoring transformations"""
    # Replace NodeAbstractResourceInstance with NodeResourceInstanceBase
    content = content.replace("NodeAbstractResourceInstance", "NodeResourceInstanceBase")
    # Replace NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance with NewNodeResourceInstanceBase
    content = content.replace("NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance", "NewNodeResourceInstanceBase")
    return content

def main():
    print("Starting refactoring: NodeAbstractResourceInstance -> NodeResourceInstanceBase")

    for file_path in FILES_TO_UPDATE:
        print(f"Processing {file_path}...")
        # We'll handle this via the MCP tools

    print("Refactoring complete!")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

conversation_events.text:
# IMPORTANT: Source Code Access

**Local source files are not present.** Your workspace does not contain source code. You **MUST** use Sourcegraph MCP tools to discover, read, and understand code before making any changes.

**Target Repository:** `github.com/sg-evals/terraform--v1.10.3`
- Use `repo:^github.com/sg-evals/terraform--v1.10.3$` filter in keyword_search
- Use `github.com/sg-evals/terraform--v1.10.3` as the `repo` parameter for go_to_definition/find_references/read_file


## Required Workflow

1. **Search first** — Use MCP tools to find relevant files and understand existing patterns
2. **Read remotely** — Use `sg_read_file` to read full file contents from Sourcegraph
3. **Edit locally** — Use Edit, Write, and Bash to create or modify files in your working directory
4. **Verify locally** — Run tests with Bash to check your changes

## Tool Selection

| Goal | Tool |
|------|------|
| Exact symbol/string | `sg_keyword_search` |
| Concepts/semantic search | `sg_nls_search` |
| Trace usage/callers | `sg_find_references` |
| See implementation | `sg_go_to_definition` |
| Read full file | `sg_read_file` |
| Browse structure | `sg_list_files` |
| Find repos | `sg_list_repos` |
| Search commits | `sg_commit_search` |
| Track changes | `sg_diff_search` |
| Compare versions | `sg_compare_revisions` |

**Decision logic:**
1. Know the exact symbol? → `sg_keyword_search`
2. Know the concept, not the name? → `sg_nls_search`
3. Need definition of a symbol? → `sg_go_to_definition`
4. Need all callers/references? → `sg_find_references`
5. Need full file content? → `sg_read_file`

## Scoping (Always Do This)

```
repo:^github.com/ORG/REPO$           # Exact repo (preferred)
repo:github.com/ORG/                 # All repos in org
file:.*\.ts$                         # TypeScript only
file:src/api/                        # Specific directory
```

Start narrow. Expand only if results are empty.

## Efficiency Rules

- Chain searches logically: search → read → references → definition
- Don't re-search for the same pattern; use results from prior calls
- Prefer `sg_keyword_search` over `sg_nls_search` when you have exact terms
- Read 2-3 related files before synthesising, rather than one at a time
- Don't read 20+ remote files without writing code — once you understand the pattern, start implementing

## If Stuck

If MCP search returns no results:
1. Broaden the search query (synonyms, partial identifiers)
2. Try `sg_nls_search` for semantic matching
3. Use `sg_list_files` to browse the directory structure
4. Use `sg_list_repos` to verify the repository name

---

**Sourcegraph Repository:** `github.com/sg-evals/terraform--v1.10.3`

# Task: Rename NodeAbstractResourceInstance to NodeResourceInstanceBase

## Objective
Rename `NodeAbstractResourceInstance` to `NodeResourceInstanceBase` in Terraform's
internal graph node hierarchy to follow Go naming conventions (avoiding "Abstract").

## Requirements

1. **Rename the struct** in `internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go`:
   - `type NodeAbstractResourceInstance struct` → `type NodeResourceInstanceBase struct`
   - Rename the file to `node_resource_instance_base.go` (optional)

2. **Update all references** (10+ call sites):
   - Embedding in other node types
   - Method receivers
   - Type assertions and casts
   - Graph builder functions

"""Script to refactor NodeAbstractResourceInstance to NodeResourceInstanceBase"""

import os

# Files that need to be updated

    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go",

    "internal/terraform/node_resource_destroy.go",
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract.go",
    "internal/terraform/transform_orphan_count.go",
]

def get_file_content_from_sg(file_path):
    """Fetch file content from Sourcegraph via sg tool"""
    # Since we can't directly call sg_read_file from Python, we'll use a different approach
    # We'll create a helper to fetch via curl from the GitHub raw content
    pass

def apply_refactoring(content):
    """Apply the refactoring transformations"""
    # Replace NodeAbstractResourceInstance with NodeResourceInstanceBase
    content = content.replace("NodeAbstractResourceInstance", "NodeResourceInstanceBase")
    # Replace NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance with NewNodeResourceInstanceBase
    content = content.replace("NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance", "NewNodeResourceInstanceBase")
    return content

def main():
    print("Starting refactoring: NodeAbstractResourceInstance -> NodeResourceInstanceBase")

    for file_path in FILES_TO_UPDATE:
        print(f"Processing {file_path}...")
        # We'll handle this via the MCP tools

    print("Refactoring complete!")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

arguments.command:
cat > /tmp/refactor.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Refactor NodeAbstractResourceInstance to NodeResourceInstanceBase

FILES=(
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract_instance_test.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_diff.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_state.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_data_destroy.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_plan.go"
    "internal/terraform/graph_builder_plan.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_deferred.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_apply.go"
    "internal/terraform/graph_builder_apply.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_import.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_forget.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_destroy.go"
    "internal/terraform/node_resource_abstract.go"
    "internal/terraform/transform_orphan_count.go"
)

for file in "${FILES[@]}"; do
    echo "Processing $file..."
    # Create backup
    cp "$file" "$file.bak"
    # Apply refactoring
    sed -i 's/NodeAbstractResourceInstance/NodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
    sed -i 's/NewNodeAbstractResourceInstance/NewNodeResourceInstanceBase/g' "$file"
done

echo "Refactoring complete!"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/refactor.sh
bash /tmp/refactor.sh
